service: Slim SEO — Meta Title & Description API
auth: none — no API keys, no passwords, no tokens
prerequisites: Slim SEO plugin installed and active on the site
post_types: Works on any post type: products, pages, posts, custom post types. Use the object ID.

endpoints.name: Set SEO Meta Title

body.title: Blue Summer Dress — Buy Online in Amman | Dukkan Fashion
Blue Summer Dress — Buy Online in Amman | Dukkan Fashion

notes: Only the title field is modified — description, images, canonical, and noindex are untouched.
If no Slim SEO meta exists yet for this post, a new entry is created automatically.
Title is sanitized — HTML tags are stripped.

endpoints.name: Set SEO Meta Description

body.description: Shop the Blue Summer Dress. Free shipping over 30 JOD. Available in sizes S–XXL.
Shop the Blue Summer Dress. Free shipping over 30 JOD. Available in sizes S–XXL.

notes: Only the description field is modified — title, images, canonical, and noindex are untouched.
If no Slim SEO meta exists yet for this post, a new entry is created automatically.
Description is sanitized — HTML tags are stripped, line breaks are preserved.

examples.curl_set_title: curl -X PUT https://fashion.dukkanjo.com/wp-json/dukkan-seo/v1/posts/42737/title -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"title":"Blue Summer Dress — Buy Online in Amman"}'
examples.curl_set_description: curl -X PUT https://fashion.dukkanjo.com/wp-json/dukkan-seo/v1/posts/42737/description -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"description":"Free shipping over 30 JOD."}'
flow: 1. Create a product via WC REST API (POST /wp-json/wc/v3/products) → get back the product ID
